arts.ttl: Juventus and Randal Kolo Muani: Why the Transfer Announcement is Delayed
arts.sum: As the January transfer window progresses, Juventus fans are eagerly awaiting the official announcement regarding the signing of Randal Kolo Muani from Paris Saint-Germain. However, despite widespread anticipation, the confirmation of this transfer has yet to materialize, leaving many to wonder about the reasons behind the delay. arts.ttl: PSG-bound Kvaratskhelia bids farewell to Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has confirmed his exit from the club in a goodbye message posted on social media on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia Bids Adieu to Napoli Ahead of PSG Switch
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia has left Naples and flown to France, where he’ll take the medicals with PSG on Friday. He departs the Azzurri after two and a half years, where he has tallied 30 goals and 29 assists in 107, contributing to the team’s fourth Scudetto. The post Kvaratskhelia Bids Adieu to Napoli Ahead of PSG Switch appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Alerted as PSG Consider €50M Bid to Bolster Their Backline
arts.sum: Milan Škriniar’s future at Paris Saint-Germain is becoming increasingly uncertain. Manager Luis Enrique has favored Willian Pacho and Marquinhos as his starting center-back pairing, fueling speculation about Škriniar’s potential departure as the January transfer window gets underway.
